name: Pushpender Singh
bio: Founded JMS Group in 2013 and has led every acquisition since. Sets the land strategy and signs off on each project's construction standard personally.

name: Virender Singh
bio: Oversees execution across the portfolio, from approvals through handover, and owns the relationship with our contracting partners.

name: Vinay Verma
bio: Leads business development and joint ventures, with a focus on the Dwarka Expressway and Golf Course Extension corridors.

name: Sanjay K. Aggarwal
bio: Runs capital structure, project finance and the transparent single-price-sheet policy that governs how we quote.

name: Ravi Kant Gautam
bio: Accountable for construction quality, third-party audits and the delivery timeline published on every project page.

name: Anisha Tiwari
bio: Leads the sales desk and the advisor team that answers every enquiry raised through this site.

name: Namrata Chopra
bio: Owns the post-booking experience: documentation, construction updates and the relationship manager assigned to each buyer.

name: Raghvendra Singh
bio: Manages channel partners and site-visit operations across Gurugram and the wider NCR.
